groupSummary: Microplastics are prevalent in clothing and can contaminate water systems, posing risks to health and the environment.

claims.claimText: Every wash of clothes leaves microplastics in the environment.

groupSummary: Research on microplastics is expanding, with various countries taking action to address the issue.
